title: Integrate existing BPlusTreeViz (820 lines) into Database module instead of building from scratch
description: QA REVIEW FINDING: The content audit (DBL-067) said 'B+ Tree is MISSING — build from scratch (L effort)'. But a complete 820-line B+ Tree visualization ALREADY EXISTS at src/components/database/BPlusTreeViz.tsx with: insert, search, delete, range query, step-through animation with motion/react springs, leaf linked-list visualization, and 9 highlight color states. It uses src/lib/data-structures/bplus-tree-ds.ts (799 lines) as its engine. Currently imported by DataStructuresModule only. INSTEAD of building from scratch: (1) Add 'B+ Tree' mode to DatabaseModule's mode list, (2) Import BPlusTreeViz component, (3) Wire to sidebar controls and properties panel, (4) Add comparison panel: 'B-Tree vs B+ Tree'. This REPLACES DBL-067 and reduces effort from L to M.
acceptanceCriteria: B+ Tree mode visible in Database module sidebar alongside existing B-Tree mode
BPlusTreeViz component renders in the Database canvas area when B+ Tree mode selected
Sidebar shows insert/search/delete/range-query controls matching BPlusTreeViz's API
Properties panel shows step details and 'How It Works' for B+ Tree
Comparison section: 'B-Tree vs B+ Tree — why databases use B+ Trees'
Leaf linked-list visualization is visible (this is the key B+ Tree differentiator)

title: Handle long entity names in ER diagram SVG — truncate or auto-resize
description: QA REVIEW FINDING: ER diagram entity width is hardcoded at 200px (DatabaseModule.tsx:199). A 50-character entity name like 'CustomerOrderPaymentHistory' would overflow the SVG text boundary. No truncation, no ellipsis, no auto-resize. Add: (1) Measure text width using SVG textLength or canvas measureText, (2) If text exceeds entity width - 24px padding, truncate with ellipsis, (3) Show full name on hover via title attribute or tooltip.
acceptanceCriteria: Entity names longer than ~18 characters are truncated with '...' in the SVG
Full name shown on hover (SVG <title> element or tooltip)
Attribute names also truncated if they exceed column width
Type labels don't overflow their column

title: Add localStorage graceful degradation for incognito/restricted storage
description: QA REVIEW FINDING: Multiple tasks plan localStorage persistence (DBL-038 state, DBL-141 streaks, DBL-143 mastery). But in incognito mode or with restricted storage policies, localStorage.setItem may throw. Add a try-catch wrapper utility: safeLocalStorage.setItem/getItem that falls back to in-memory Map when localStorage is unavailable. All future persistence code should use this utility.
acceptanceCriteria: try-catch around localStorage.setItem — falls back to in-memory Map
try-catch around localStorage.getItem — returns null if unavailable
All Database module persistence features use safeLocalStorage instead of raw localStorage
Module works correctly in incognito mode (features degrade gracefully, no errors)
